checks.title: Enable the platform screen reader and focus the board
Confirm one board focus target with no square descendants
Confirm the spoken role, orientation, square, piece, and flags
Exercise increment and decrement across rows and boundaries
Exercise every available directional action and edge
Retain host focus and canonical cursor through orientation change
Refresh value without moving the cursor after controlled updates
Speak repeated announcement text once for each new ID
Preserve focus and cursor through reduced-motion changes
Expose no interaction action without its callback gate
Publish ordinary square activation through controlled selection
Route a selected destination to exactly one move request
Clear controlled selection through one explicit action
Submit one transient source-target move request
Exercise accessible removal and cancellation
Keep two provider boards independently focusable
Place a selected spare through the named board
Cancel a spare without exposing actions on an unrelated board
Create one controlled arrow through accessibility actions
Cancel arrow composition without emitting an operation
Toggle one controlled square annotation on and off
Suppress move and activation actions during annotation mode
Clear clipped spare selection after background and resume
Cancel a native drag across app lifecycle and restore accessible use
Observe board and spare piece presses exactly once
Keep physical press boundaries out of accessibility activation
